name: Wrapped Savings rUSD
redeem:
Instant onchain redemption back to rUSD via the ERC-4626
  contract with no lockups or fees. rUSD can then be redeemed 1:1 for USDC,
  USDT, or USD1 via the Peg Stability Module (PSM) if liquidity is available.
notes:
wsrUSD is an ERC-4626 wrapper for Reservoir's stablecoin rUSD
  that compounds yield per-second with no deposit/withdrawal fees (unlike the
  daily-compounding srUSD which carries a one-day interest burn fee).
  Governance actively adjusts the APY based on protocol balance sheet
  performance.
